exception.message: class java.lang.Float cannot be cast to class java.lang.Integer (java.lang.Float and java.lang.Integer are in module java.base of loader 'bootstrap')

test-method.name: testEmailCaseInsensitivity
test-method.description: RA-02: Verify Case Insensitivity for Email Login

test-method.name: testLoginResponseTime
test-method.description: RA-03: Performance - Login Response Time SLA

test-method.name: testLoginSchema
test-method.description: RA-05: Data Consistency - Login Response Schema Validation

test-method.name: testMalformedJson
test-method.description: RA-04: Verify Registration Payload with Malformed JSON

test-method.name: testNoSQLInjection
test-method.description: RA-01: Verify NoSQL Injection Prevention in Login
